_comment: Template for the two MCP servers this skill uses. Copy the relevant entries into your agent's MCP config (Claude Code: .mcp.json at the project root, or `claude mcp add`), then fill in the redacted credentials. Both servers are optional — the skill falls back to bundled references/ when they are absent (see SKILL.md → Check MCP Servers). Ask the Ludeo integrations team for current URLs and credentials.

sdk-docs._purpose: Search the Ludeo SDK documentation — API reference, method signatures, parameter structs, callback chains. Primary source for SDK details at any phase. Fallback: bundled references/sdk-reference/ (concepts only) plus grepping the installed plugin headers under Plugins/LudeoUESDK/Source/ for exact signatures.

ludeo-context._purpose: Ludeo company knowledge base — integration templates, QA workflows, event lists, repo context. Most useful for Phase 1 (architecture analysis) and Phases 4-5 (action discovery from QA event lists). Fallback: proceed without; analysis quality may be reduced.
